identity.title: Log RSSI Power Detector
identity.supported_scope: pure voltage-domain event-driven transient behavioral Verilog-A

parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets rise and fall smoothing for out and metric

parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets the voltage-coded clk and rst decision threshold

properties.observable_contract: Initialization or active reset drives out to 0.12 V and metric to 0 V.
Each rising clk crossing while reset is inactive samples the magnitude abs(vin - 0.45 V); the held outputs do not track vin between samples.
Sampled magnitudes below 0.035 V, from 0.035 V to below 0.11 V, from 0.11 V to below 0.22 V, and at least 0.22 V map to out levels 0.12 V, 0.30 V, 0.54 V, and 0.72 V respectively.
Metric equals three times the sampled magnitude, clamped to the 0 V to 0.9 V range.
Out remains within the public 0.08 V to 0.82 V clamp range with finite transition smoothing.

modeling_constraints: Keep event-triggered state updates separate from unconditional output contributions.
Do not add undeclared artifacts, ports, validation state, or simulator-specific side channels.
